title: Legal servitudes; notion.
doc_html:
CHAPTER 3--LEGAL SERVITUDES

SECTION 1--LIMITATIONS OF OWNERSHIP

Art. 659.  Legal servitudes; notion.

Legal servitudes are limitations on ownership established by law for the benefit of the general public or for the benefit of particular persons.

Acts 1977, No. 514, §1.
